title: Looking for Category Manager at Goibibo

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Goibibo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Goibibo family as a Category Manager in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Goibibo:
Goibibo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
